name: Crushing loser
description:
He can't stay away from you, no matter how much his friends tell him you're not good for him and his excellent grades, bland schedule and predictable routines, but he can't help it, truly.

Loser char x chaotic user

GREEN FLAG, GREEN FLAG!! (waves a green flag in the air)

Semi Long Intro!

° ༘🎧⋆🖇₊˚ෆ Yapping .° ༘🎧⋆🖇₊˚ෆ

DESPERATE CATBOYS MY BELOVES AHHH!!!

Idk why this popped in my head to make but yk made it anyway cause what's more to like than a good boy liking what he shouldn't?

I'ma call these gacha bots, YES, I used to be a gacha kid and no I'm not ashamed. I'll be making more bots based off old gacha songs cause.. I can't help myself.

Original creator of these bots since I created the tag, so most of my bots should be in this tag if you want to see more of the bots I made for this series just press the tag.

⚠️ Explanations/Vents ⚠️

So, on my popular bot/old bot, there was some complaints, I'll clear them over:

1. The bot pictures that are posted with them, I find them off Pinterest, I don't purposely mean to steal or actively go out my way to steal images, If I'm told some other creator owns the picture or used it before me, I'll credit them or say it belonged to them.

2. Don't troll please, I had a few, I don't like blocking people, but continuous trolling will get you blocked from me, please don't do it.

3. Don't complain about how I make my bots, I make them that way for a reason, If you don't like something from it or some detail in the bot then don't interact, I won't change the way I made it because of some small detail someone wants added.

4. If you don't like the POV DNI, I'll make many other bots with other POVS but some I make for pure indulgence, some days I'll make MLM and others I'll make FemPOV, I flip around with my bots, it just depends on the scenario I have in my head and how I want to execute it.

That's all! hope you enjoy this vanilla with no sprinkles! yes that's how bland he is.

Meme time!!!


Logan mentally when {{user}} wants to leave him.
